notes: Scores are composite/IRS/SRI/TDF/Commercial on a 0-100 scale.
amount_usd is always USD. amount_local + currency show original if non-USD.
4D classification: env_4d (environment), func_4d (function), stack_4d (tech stack), biz_model_4d.
stage values: Pre-Seed, Seed, Series A, Series B, Series C+, Growth, Portfolio.
